misc: Has been working on his mental game a lot
biography: Eero, the pride of Vuosaari Golf Helsinki and younger brother of the esteemed Pasi, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Known for his calculated approach and steely determination, Eero has graced the tournament with his presence on 8 occasions, a testament to his enduring commitment to this competition.

Though the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded him thus far, Eero's competitive spirit remains undimmed. He has distinguished himself as a formidable player, capturing the individual Victor Trophy title, a testament to his exceptional skill and focus under pressure.

Notably absent from the lineup of Hector Trophée 2026, Eero has reportedly been dedicating himself to refining his mental game. With a renewed sense of purpose, Eero is sure to be a force to be reckoned with whenever he chooses to return to competition.
